alphavantage.description: Alpha Vantage official remote MCP server. Provides real-time stock prices, company overview, income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow data.
notes: API key is read from the ALPHA_VANTAGE environment variable defined in .env.
The key is sent as the 'apikey' HTTP header — NOT as a query-parameter.
Transport changed from streamable-http to sse: the AV server rejects GET with 405.

financialdatasets.description: Financial Datasets official remote MCP server. Exposes financial statement tools: income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, key metrics, and earnings data.
notes: API key is read from the FINANCIAL_DATASET environment variable defined in .env.
The key is sent as X-API-KEY HTTP header at runtime — never hardcoded here.
